title: lepistemon urceolatus
intro: Lepistemon urceolatus, also known as the 'Urn Flower', is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lepistemon urceolatus include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its roots to create a decoction for medicinal purposes.
